config.CACHE_ATLASES.tooltip: Caches stitched atlases, significantly reducing GPU upload time

config.UNSAFE_MIPMAP_GENERATION.tooltip: Skips redundant safety checks when generating mipmaps
config.compression.tooltip: The level of compression to use when saving the cache
config.custom_splashes.tooltip: Use ; to separate lines and ;; for a semicolon
